title: CsCl purified phage lysate, Proteinase K, SDS

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"76ks0","text":"I used 400 µl CsCl purified lysate = add 1 µl of ProtK 20 mg/ml stock (20µg) and 20 µl 10% SDS stock (0.5% final concentration).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mix 1 volume of dialyzed, CsCl purified phage lysate with 50 µg/ml Proteinase K
creator: Verve Team
